name: Why is Siri ignoring my content?
description: Usually because the content is unclear, inconsistent, hard to index, or not the best match for the query.

mainEntity.name: Why is Siri ignoring my content?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your pages are not being surfaced, first verify that Siri can access the right language and device settings on the user side. Then make sure your content is crawlable, indexable, and written in simple question-and-answer format. Siri also tends to do better with direct, factual pages than with vague marketing copy.
acceptedAnswer.description: Usually because the content is unclear, inconsistent, hard to index, or not the best match for the query.
